objective: Produce a fixture-scoped scene design note with evidence links for reviewer handoff.

scope.summary: Bounded design documentation and fixture evidence only.
inScope: Reference task board and ownership policy evidence
outOfScope: No source mutation outside listed fixture artifacts
No command execution from the work package
No hidden background agents, auto-apply, auto-merge, or self-approval

forbiddenActions: Do not execute commands from the package
Do not spawn hidden background agents
Do not auto-apply, auto-merge, self-approve, or bypass reviewer gates
Do not use browser command bridge, trusted browser writes, or credentialed commands

acceptanceCriteria.description: Work output links task board and ownership evidence for reviewer inspection
Package names a reviewer handoff target and expected evidence

verificationCommands.boundary: inert display text only; work package does not execute commands

blockedReasons: ownership evidence must be reviewed before writing fixture output
boundary: Fixture-scoped untrusted assignment only; it does not execute commands, spawn agents, write trusted browser state, apply changes, merge PRs, or grant authority.
